@shawnlutz509 @shawnlutz509 It’s a good point. Food and yard debris make up over a third of the material, by weight, that we manage for our customers. Even when food is no longer safe for human consumption, it still has tremendous value as a source of compost and energy.

@charmainesnames @charmainesnames Great questions. WM’s #RecycleRight consumer education program has helped reduce contamination levels at our facilities from 24% to ~19%. Supporting brands that utilize recycled content also helps the economics and values of recycled materials.
